headline: GDV’s 6.1% Yield Faces a Hidden Test in 2026 Small-Cap Downturn
summary: Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust (NYSE:GDV) trades near $29 and pays a $0.15 monthly distribution, up from $0.11 per month in 2024 to $0.14 in 2025 to $0.15 starting January 2026. At the current price, that yields roughly 6.1% annualized yield, well above the 10-year Treasury at about 4.3%. The question for income investors in ... headline: Canaccord Calls AbbVie a Core Holding With a $262 Target: Is This Biopharma’s Most Durable Compounder?
summary: One of Wall Street’s top firms just made the bull case for AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) stock, initiating coverage with a Buy rating and a $262 price target. Canaccord calls AbbVie a “core holding” for large-cap biopharma investors, pointing to a “solid and visible” growth profile underpinned by three distinct franchise pillars. With shares trading near $205, ... Canaccord Calls AbbVie a Core Holding With a $262 Target: Is This Biopharma’s Most Durable Compounder?
